question: Return the name of the discount that corresponds to the most rental history records.
sql: SELECT D.name FROM Discount D JOIN Renting_history R ON D.id = R.discount_id GROUP BY D.id ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1;

back_translation.intent: 查找使用折扣次数最多的折扣名称

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致。原始问题要求找出拥有最多租赁记录的折扣名称，SQL描述通过COUNT(*)统计每个折扣的记录数，按COUNT(*) DESC排序后取第一条，且关联了Discount和Renting_history表，符合原始问题意图。
